typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Identify a public-liquidity or already-held executor asset route -> permissionlessly call addProposal before any legitimate DAO submission -> answer the Realitio question immediately because opening_ts is hardcoded to 0 -> use the prematurely-finalized YES to execute a malicious Safe bundle that delegatecalls into the verifier and sweeps value to the verifier"
